creator: marco.broeder@posteo.eu
text:
Created attachment 154324
Update trojita to 0.5 release

- Update to 0.5 release
- Add DBUS cmake option
- Disable broken QTKEYCHAIN and CLEARTEXT plugins
- Switch from qt4-linguist to the new qt4-linguisttools


Tests (qt5 and qt4 version) on head, stable/10 - amd64:
- portlint
- poudriere testport + bulk, logs available
- pkg install + delete
- runtime on stable/10 amd64

Build tests on 9.x were not possible at the moment because of dependencies
build failures.

Thanks!
